actor_claims.quote_text: Providence and Worcester Railroad Company (“PWRR” or the “Company”)

actor_relation_claims.quote_text: providing for the acquisition of the Company by G&W through the merger of Merger Sub with and into the Company
actor_relation_claims.role_detail: Merger Sub is used for G&W's acquisition of the Company

actor_relation_claims.quote_text: excluding common stock owned by G&W or any of its direct or indirect subsidiaries, including Merger Sub
actor_relation_claims.role_detail: Merger Sub is a direct or indirect subsidiary of G&W

actor_relation_claims.quote_text: If completed, the merger will result in the Company becoming a wholly-owned subsidiary of G&W.
actor_relation_claims.role_detail: Company will become a wholly-owned subsidiary of G&W if the merger is completed

event_claims.description: Providence and Worcester Railroad Company entered into a merger agreement with Genesee & Wyoming Inc. and Pullman Acquisition Sub Inc.
event_claims.quote_text: On August 12, 2016, Providence and Worcester Railroad Company (“PWRR” or the “Company”) entered into a merger agreement among the Company, Genesee & Wyoming Inc. (“G&W”) and Pullman Acquisition Sub Inc. (“Merger Sub”), providing for the acquisition of the Company by G&W through the merger of Merger Sub with and into the Company (the “merger”), with the Company surviving the merger.

event_claims.description: Genesee & Wyoming Inc. entered into a merger agreement for the acquisition of Providence and Worcester Railroad Company through the merger of Pullman Acquisition Sub Inc. with and into the Company.
event_claims.quote_text: On August 12, 2016, Providence and Worcester Railroad Company (“PWRR” or the “Company”) entered into a merger agreement among the Company, Genesee & Wyoming Inc. (“G&W”) and Pullman Acquisition Sub Inc. (“Merger Sub”), providing for the acquisition of the Company by G&W through the merger of Merger Sub with and into the Company (the “merger”), with the Company surviving the merger.

event_claims.description: Pullman Acquisition Sub Inc. entered into a merger agreement under which it would merge with and into Providence and Worcester Railroad Company, with the Company surviving the merger.
event_claims.quote_text: On August 12, 2016, Providence and Worcester Railroad Company (“PWRR” or the “Company”) entered into a merger agreement among the Company, Genesee & Wyoming Inc. (“G&W”) and Pullman Acquisition Sub Inc. (“Merger Sub”), providing for the acquisition of the Company by G&W through the merger of Merger Sub with and into the Company (the “merger”), with the Company surviving the merger.
